race.comment: LAKEVIEW LIGHTNING (2) led and won in a similar race last time out at York, proving too strong as the front. Faithfull hops on board now and he looks set to take up the running yet again. Can dictate from the front and repeat the dose. SNIP'S ROCK (10) will be fitter for the fresh run last start and the rise in trip is right up her alley. Nicely placed after the claim of Tsang in this easier assignment and she only just missed here back in December. Can feature in the finish. ASARKA (14) turned in a decent effort last start to finish third over 1920m at York. Likely improver with strong prospects. TAK GOES BOOM (7) finished out of the money two starts back then was beaten 1.4 lengths when fourth over 1800m at Ascot two-and-a-half weeks ago. Has the ability to produce a better result. BELLA VIOLETTA (4) is better than she showed last time out and can bounce back in this much easier assignment.
